text: Hi, my name is Dave Whiting from the Montague Corporation and I'd like to present to you
the new 2010 Paratrooper Bike. This bike is presently used by every branch of the military
and is for both civilian and military use. Presently these bikes are in 18 different
international distributors and over 500 retailers in the United States. The bike itself has
24 speeds, it weighs approximately 29 pounds, it's fast, it's light, I personally commute
with one of these. It's a tremendous all around bike. I'd now like to show you how the Paratrooper
folds down very quickly and easily.
This is the new Paratrooper Bike. It's a very simple bike, it's a very light bike,
it's a very light bike, it's a very light bike, it's a very light bike, it's a very light bike,
it's a very light bike, it's a very light bike, it's a very light bike, it's a very light
bike, it's a very light bike, it's a very light bike,
and it's got a little patented Klik's Front Wheel Release system. You open up the lever
and you squeeze it, the front wheel comes off very, very quickly and easily.
The fold of the bike I'm going to stand it up to demonstrate. You take the top quick
release, open it up, push on it, and so the front wheels come off very quickly and easily.
The bike folds up just like that.
It weighs about 29 pounds.
You can stick it into your vehicle very easily.
You can take it with you.
You can take it into your apartment, store it in your house, put it under your desk.
Close the top, take the front wheel, stick it back on, close it.
That's it.
2010 Paratrooper.
Thank you.
